title: jk-task-literature-search shortlist candidate
description: Structured per-candidate object emitted by jk-task-literature-search. One row in summary_table.json with extras in references.json. The Markdown shortlist (Step 4) is rendered from this object; downstream skills (nova-workflow-knowledge-investigation, nova-workflow-calib-plan, nova-workflow-project-scoping, jk-task-extract-data-table) consume this shape.

nct_id.description: ClinicalTrials.gov NCT identifier when the candidate is a registry / results record, or when a publication has been linked to its registry entry by jk-trial-data-scoping.

evidence_type.description: review | phase-3 trial | phase-2 trial | phase-1 trial | observational study | cohort study | registry | animal study | in vitro study | QSP model | PBPK model | Pop-PK model | mechanistic model | mathematical model | computational model | practice guideline | meta-analysis | clinical trial registry | clinical trial results | natural history registry | observational study registry

entities.description: canonical_name values from the Entity Table built in Step 0

expected_evidence.description: mechanism description | time-course data | dose-response data | equations and parameters | baseline characteristics | endpoint summary | etc.

verification_note.description: One line listing the matched verification signals (e.g. 'Table 1 reports week-24 HbA1c change-from-baseline, N=303').

query_provenance.description: Which angled queries from the single search pass surfaced this candidate.

angle.description: The PubMed query string (or, for NCT-seeded queries, the `<NCT_ID>[si]` query) that returned this candidate.
